chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 554 of 2006 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.2070/2025 (Condonation) 2. For hearing of CMA No.2227/20219 (C/A) 04-11-2025 Syed Hamad Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Professor Dr. Wahid Bux Jatoi, Pro Vice-Chancellor and Dr. Zulfiqar Ali Shaikh, Registrar, Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents/University, which is taken on record. We have been informed by learned counsel for the Respondents / University that the original order dated 20-12-2017 has been complied with; same is affirmed by the counsel for the Petitioner/applicant. In the circumstances, both these pending applications are disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
